title: Wrils
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Svivren.jpg|thumb|A slum in Wrils.]]
'''Wrils''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the southern district of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Svivren]].

{{City-stub}}
